data_collected.source_quote: Affirm Credit collects personal information such as name, email address, and payment information from their customers. Additionally, Affirm may use cookies and other tracking technologies to collect information about customer website usage.

purposes_of_collection.source_quote: Affirm uses customer information to provide and improve its services, respond to customer inquiries, and personalize customer experiences. They may also use this information for marketing purposes.

cross_site_tracking.source_quote: Affirm may use cookies and other tracking technologies to collect information about customer website usage.

third_party_recipients.source_quote: Affirm may share customer information with third-party service providers and affiliates for business purposes, such as payment processing and customer support.

access_your_data.source_quote: Customers have the option to access their personal information.

delete_your_data.source_quote: Customers have the option to delete their personal information.

correct_inaccuracies.source_quote: Customers have the option to update their personal information.

opt_out_of_sale_sharing.source_quote: Customers have the option to opt-out of receiving marketing communications.

encrypted_in_transit.source_quote: Affirm uses industry-standard security technologies and procedures to prevent unauthorized access.

breach_notification.source_quote: Affirm notified affected users of the Evolve data breach and has incident response plans in place.

independent_audits.source_quote: Affirm maintains compliance with SOC 2 Type II, PCI DSS Level 1, and conducts security audits and assessments.

gaps: GPC and DNT signal handling not mentioned
label_notes: Affirm provides basic user rights (access, delete, update, opt-out) but lacks detail on data retention and portability. Security compliance is strong with SOC 2 Type II and PCI DSS Level 1 certifications. The company has demonstrated breach notification procedures following 2024 Evolve Bank incident.
